title: router.py: dtn_buffer rebuild creates new deque from generator on every expire/retrieve
description:
In Router.dtn_expire() and dtn_retrieve_for(), the dtn_buffer is rebuilt by creating a new deque from a generator expression. This is O(n) and allocates a new deque each time. For frequently called expiry checks this adds up. Consider using deque.remove() for single-item removal or maintaining a separate index for efficient lookup.

File: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py lines 468-475
